name: Oxidative Phosphorylation
description: Oxidative phosphorylation: electrons from NADH/FADH2 pass through respiratory complexes to O2 while protons are pumped across the inner membrane, and the resulting proton-motive force drives ATP synthase, with respiratory control by ADP availability.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["NADH / FADH2 fuel"]
    N2["Complex I/II oxidize"]
    N3["Ubiquinone shuttle"]
    N4["Complex III -> cyt c"]
    N5["Complex IV reduces O2"]
    N6["Protons pumped out"]
    N7["Proton-motive force"]
    N8["ATP synthase rotates"]
    N9{"ADP available?"}
    N10["ATP synthesized"]
    N11["Backpressure slows ETC"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N2 --> N6
    N4 --> N6
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 -->|yes| N10
    N9 -->|no ADP| N11
    N11 -->|respiratory con…| N2

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
